## 📑 Pull Request Description
<!-- Kripya ek chhota summary dein ki aapne kaun sa tool ya tool-link add/update kiya hai -->

## 🗂️ Type of Change
- [ ] ➕ Added new verified premium resource(s)
- [ ] 🔧 Fixed / Updated an existing broken link
- [ ] 📝 General documentation improvement (README, Guides)
- [ ] 🤖 Automation script / GitHub Action modification

## 🔍 Quality Assurance Checklist
- [ ] **Secure Links:** Mere saare added resource links strictly **HTTPS** use karte hain.
- [ ] **Correct Category:** Maine links ko sahi category file ke andar hi add kiya hai.
- [ ] **Standard Design:** Maine formatting ko master `category-template.md` ke unique table layout ke mutabik hi rakha hai.
- [ ] **No Duplicates:** Maine verify kar liya hai ki ye tool pehle se is repo me added nahi tha.

## 📷 Screenshots / Visual Proof (If Applicable)
<!-- Agar aapne koi visual change ya template design change kiya hai, toh screenshot yahan attach karein -->
